scripts.shell:dev:testing: bash scripts/generate-shell-env.sh testing && pnpm -C apps/shell run dev
scripts.shell:dev:staging: bash scripts/generate-shell-env.sh staging && pnpm -C apps/shell run dev
scripts.shell:dev:production: bash scripts/generate-shell-env.sh production && pnpm -C apps/shell run dev
scripts.deploy:testing: bash scripts/deploy-infra.sh testing && bash scripts/update-database.sh testing && bash scripts/deploy-api.sh testing && bash scripts/generate-shell-env.sh testing && pnpm -C apps/shell run build && bash scripts/upload-shell.sh testing && bash scripts/show-url.sh testing
scripts.deploy:staging: bash scripts/deploy-infra.sh staging && bash scripts/update-database.sh staging && bash scripts/deploy-api.sh staging && bash scripts/generate-shell-env.sh staging && pnpm -C apps/shell run build && bash scripts/upload-shell.sh staging && bash scripts/show-url.sh staging
scripts.deploy:production: bash scripts/deploy-infra.sh production && bash scripts/update-database.sh production && bash scripts/deploy-api.sh production && bash scripts/generate-shell-env.sh production && pnpm -C apps/shell run build && bash scripts/upload-shell.sh production && bash scripts/show-url.sh production
